title: replace
system: valve Check valve guide/valve stem clearance

blocks.text: Check valve guide/valve stem clearance, replace

Inspect the valve. ​ Measure the inside diameter of the valve guide and calculate the clearance between the valve guide and valve stem. Inner diameter of guide - Outer diameter of stem = Clearance between valve guide and valve stem Intake: 1 Std. 0.025－0.050mm Limit value: 1 0.08mm Exhaust: (1) Std. 0.055－0.080mm Limit value: 1 0.11mm

items: If the limit value is exceeded, replace the valve and valve guide as a set.

blocks.text: Valve Guide Driver 5.35 Punch the valve guide from the combustion chamber side using 9.7 (07742-0010100).

Lubricate the outer circumference of the valve guide with engine oil. Valve Guide Driver 5.35 Use 9.7 to hammer in the valve guide (A). Valve Guide protrusion length Intake: 1 15.2－16.2mm Exhaust: (1) 16.0－17.0mm

items: Be sure to match the specified valve guide protrusion length (B).

blocks.text: Use the valve guide reamer 5.525 (07HAH-PJ70100) to correct the reaming.

items: Rotate the reamer in a clockwise direction only. Do not insert or pull out the reamer while it is stopped.
After reaming, measure the inside diameter of the valve guide.

items.text: Rotate the reamer in a clockwise direction only. Do not insert or pull out the reamer while it is stopped.
Rotate the reamer in a clockwise direction only. Do not insert or pull out the reamer while it is stopped.
After reaming, measure the inside diameter of the valve guide.
